# Requirements for lteb_PATproject
# Generated by analyzing the actual imports in interfaccia.py and programma_background.py
# Tested with Python 3.10+ (developed on Python 3.12)
#
# Installation:
#   pip install -r requirements.txt

# --- Graphical interface (Streamlit) ---
streamlit>=1.35
streamlit-option-menu>=0.3.13
streamlit-pills>=0.3.0
streamlit-autorefresh>=1.0.1
streamlit-shadcn-ui>=0.1.18

# --- Bluetooth Low Energy communication with the two Arduino boards (nRF52840) ---
bleak>=0.22
nest-asyncio>=1.6.0

# --- Data and signal processing ---
pandas>=2.2
numpy>=1.26
scipy>=1.13
scikit-learn>=1.5

# --- Visualization ---
matplotlib>=3.9
plotly>=5.22

# --- Image handling (user profile pictures) ---
Pillow>=10.3

# --- User authentication (password hashing in the SQLite database) ---
bcrypt>=4.1

# Note: the following modules are part of the Python standard library
# and should NOT be installed via pip: pickle, os, sqlite3, io, base64, asyncio,
# subprocess, struct, time, datetime, warnings, signal, sys, queue, csv
